data.title: Banco Comercial Português, S.A. informs on the changes to proposals 5 and 9 of the AGM
data.description: Banco Comercial Português, S.A. has reported alterations to proposals 5 and 9 for the Annual General Meeting of 2026. Proposal 5 now includes the annex, while Proposal 9 has been modified in terms of the CV. The bank has provided this information regarding the upcoming AGM, with the adjustments made to these particular agenda items.

data.title: Reverie Active Adult by Dream Finders Homes Celebrates Grand Opening of Reverie at Parkhaven in Hermitage
data.description: In Hermitage, Tennessee, the grand opening of Reverie at Parkhaven, a new 55+ community by Dream Finders Homes, was celebrated recently. The event, which took place on March 13th, marked the official launch of the community just outside Nashville. Residents of the active adult community can enjoy various amenities and activities catered to their age group.

data.title: Deoleo Achieves 2030 Recycled Plastic Target Five Years Early
data.description: Dallas, April 15, 2026 - Deoleo, the leading olive oil company globally, has released its 2025 Sustainability Report which details the key advancements in environmental, social, and governance (ESG) aspects made in the past fiscal year. As the world's top olive oil provider, the firm showcases its growth and commitment to sustainability through this report.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq Pumps Higher Amid Trump Comments; Fed Report Looms (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today, the stock market saw fluctuating trade as the Dow Jones index reacted to President Donald Trump's statements regarding U.S.-Iran peace talks. Meanwhile, the Nasdaq index showed growth amidst the uncertainty. Investors are also anticipating the release of a Federal Reserve report. Stay updated with live coverage on this developing situation.

data.title: Imperial Dade Canada Enters into a Definitive Agreement to Acquire Enterprise Paper
data.description: Imperial Dade, a distributor of food service packaging and janitorial supplies, has announced the acquisition of Enterprise Paper Holdings, Ltd. The deal involves a private transaction, with financial details remaining undisclosed. Established in 1973, Enterprise Paper is a Canadian-owned company specializing in paper, packaging, and janitorial products. The company has operations in British Columbia and Alberta. The transaction marks a significant development for Imperial Dade in expanding its presence in Canada.

data.title: ELRON VENTURES PORTFOLIO COMPANY ZENGO TO BE ACQUIRED BY ETORO
data.description: A recent transaction in Tel Aviv on April 15, 2026, marks the increasing merging of self-custody services, digital asset infrastructure, and multi-asset platforms. Elron Ventures Ltd. (TASE: ELRN), a tech investment company specializing in nurturing and expanding various ventures, made significant moves in this direction. This transaction signifies the growing alignment of these sectors, emphasizing the importance of digital asset management.

data.title: As AI Adoption Outpaces Controls, ISACA Launches Advanced in AI Risk Certification
data.description: In Schaumburg, Illinois, ISACA has launched the Advanced in AI Risk (AAIR) certification to help IT risk professionals manage the growing integration of AI in businesses. With organizations embracing AI more than ever, professionals need to navigate the balance between AI's benefits and potential risks. The AAIR certification aims to equip professionals with the expertise to handle the intricate risks associated with AI. This credential certifies candidates' proficiency in assessing vulnerabilities, threats, and risks in AI technologies.

data.title: Pakistan ends 8-year ban on crypto banking post Trump, Binance connections. Banks can serve registered firms, but can't trade crypto themselves.
data.description: Following the lifting of a ban imposed in 2018, banks in Pakistan are now permitted to offer services to registered cryptocurrency companies. However, these banks themselves are not allowed to engage in cryptocurrency trading. This decision opens up opportunities for the registered crypto firms to conduct business more easily in the country.

data.title: The Inner Circle acknowledges Scotty Lynn, M.D. as an Inner Circle Lifetime member
data.description: In McKinney, Texas, on April 15, 2026, Scotty Lynn, M.D. was recognized as an esteemed Inner Circle Lifetime member for his notable work in Energy Innovation and Power Distribution. Dr. Lynn has been instrumental in advancing safer technologies and systems.

data.title: The Inner Circle acknowledges Christopher M. Mallett as a Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence
data.description: In Clackamas, Oregon, on April 15, 2026, Christopher M. Mallett is celebrated in The Inner Circle as a distinguished member, being honored as a Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence for his outstanding work in the construction sector. Mallett's significant achievements in the industry have been acknowledged, solidifying his position as a key figure in construction.

data.title: The Inner Circle acknowledges Neil H. Fishman, CPA, CFE as a Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence
data.description: In Boynton Beach, Florida on April 15, 2026, Neil H. Fishman, a CPA and CFE, has been acknowledged in The Inner Circle as a top professional in the Accounting industry. He has achieved the prestigious title of Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence for his notable contributions. Neil H. Fishman holds multiple certifications including CPA, CFE, FCPA, and CAMS.

data.title: The Inner Circle acknowledges Calvin Harper as a Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence
data.description: In Cincinnati on April 15, 2026, Calvin Harper was recognized in The Inner Circle as a distinguished Pinnacle Professional Member of the Inner Circle of Excellence for his significant contributions to Youth Leadership and Career Development. Harper has established an esteemed career and has been acknowledged for his achievements in these areas.

data.title: The Inner Circle acknowledges Lana Lavenbarg as a Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence
data.description: Lana Lavenbarg, a prominent figure in the field of Residential Real Estate, has recently been recognized as a Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence in a prestigious publication. Hailing from Grants Pass, Oregon, Lana Lavenbarg has made significant contributions to the industry through her esteemed career. This accolade emphasizes her standing within the sector and underscores her dedication to her work. Such recognition highlights the impact of Lana Lavenbarg's expertise and professionalism in the realm of Residential Real Estate.
